questionHtml:
Which is a feature of phloem sieve tube cells?


A.  Numerous chloroplasts

B.  No nucleus

C.  Lignified walls

D.  No cytoplasm

meta.title: Which is a feature of phloem sieve tube cells? A. Numerous chloroplasts B. No nucleus C. Lignified walls D. No cytoplasm
